requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — Transport Canada TDG and UN 38.3
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——加拿大运输部TDG及UN 38.3
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——加拿大運輸部TDG及UN 38.3

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks are dangerous goods for Canadian transport when shipped as cells, batteries, or equipment containing lithium batteries. Shipments to Canada must be classified, packaged, marked, labelled, and documented under the Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations, with lithium-ion batteries normally moving as UN 3480 or UN 3481. A valid UN 38.3 test summary/report is expected for the specific cell or battery configuration before transport.
summary.zh: 锂电池及移动电源以电芯、电池或含锂电池设备形式运输至加拿大时，属于危险货物。进入加拿大的货物须按《危险货物运输条例》完成分类、包装、标记、标签和文件要求；锂离子电池通常按UN 3480或UN 3481运输。运输前应具备覆盖具体电芯或电池配置的有效UN 38.3测试摘要/报告。
summary.zht: 鋰電池及行動電源以電芯、電池或含鋰電池設備形式運輸至加拿大時，屬於危險品。進入加拿大的貨物須按《危險品運輸條例》完成分類、包裝、標記、標籤和文件要求；鋰離子電池通常按UN 3480或UN 3481運輸。運輸前應具備覆蓋具體電芯或電池配置的有效UN 38.3測試摘要/報告。

standards_or_laws: Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations, SOR/2001-286
UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium metal and lithium-ion batteries
Transport Canada TDG lithium battery shipping guidance

summary.en: Chinese exporters commonly maintain UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, air transport identification reports, and sea transport dangerous goods documentation for lithium batteries. China-side transport files help, but they do not replace Canadian TDG classification, Canadian-consignee documentation, carrier acceptance checks, or package marking and labelling expectations for import into Canada.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常会为锂电池准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、航空运输鉴定书及海运危险货物文件。中国侧运输文件有帮助，但不能替代加拿大TDG分类、加拿大收货方文件、承运人接收检查，以及进口加拿大所需的包装标记和标签要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常會為鋰電池準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、航空運輸鑑定書及海運危險品文件。中國側運輸文件有幫助，但不能替代加拿大TDG分類、加拿大收貨方文件、承運人接收檢查，以及進口加拿大所需的包裝標記和標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: JT/T 617 — Road transport of dangerous goods
CAAC dangerous goods air transport requirements

gap.en: The shared baseline is UN 38.3, but the Canadian import gap is TDG execution: correct UN number, shipping name, class, packing instruction, lithium battery mark or Class 9 label where applicable, emergency and carrier documents, and Canadian-side responsibility for dangerous goods handling. Exporters should confirm that the UN 38.3 file covers the final power bank model, not only a component cell.
gap.zh: 共同基线是UN 38.3，但加拿大进口差距在于TDG执行：正确的UN编号、运输名称、类别、包装指令、适用时的锂电池标记或第9类标签、应急及承运人文件，以及加拿大侧危险货物处理责任。出口商应确认UN 38.3文件覆盖最终移动电源型号，而不仅是电芯部件。
gap.zht: 共同基線是UN 38.3，但加拿大進口差距在於TDG執行：正確的UN編號、運輸名稱、類別、包裝指令、適用時的鋰電池標記或第9類標籤、應急及承運人文件，以及加拿大側危險品處理責任。出口商應確認UN 38.3文件覆蓋最終行動電源型號，而不僅是電芯部件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TDG Regulations apply to dangerous goods transported in Canada; UN 38.3 is required for lithium battery transport acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for most export transport channels — UN 38.3 and dangerous goods transport documentation are commonly required for air and sea shipments

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China UN 38.3 report is necessary but not sufficient. Canada-bound shipments must be prepared and accepted under Transport Canada TDG rules and carrier dangerous goods procedures.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国UN 38.3报告是必要条件，但并不充分。发往加拿大的货物仍须按加拿大运输部TDG规则及承运人危险货物程序准备并获得接收。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國UN 38.3報告是必要條件，但並不充分。發往加拿大的貨物仍須按加拿大運輸部TDG規則及承運人危險品程序準備並獲得接收。
